grant_title: 2026 Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) Program - City of Burlington
geographic_restrictions: Burlington, Vermont (Chittenden County for some programs)
project_area: Community development, housing, food access, economic development, education, and social services
demographic_requirements: Low- to moderate-income residents, underserved populations (e.g., immigrants, refugees, BIPOC, people with disabilities, seniors, individuals with mental health or substance use issues, survivors of domestic violence, homeless individuals)
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include nonprofit organizations, community-based groups, local government agencies, and small businesses (for specific microbusiness programs) operating in Burlington, Vermont. Projects must address community development, housing, economic development, or social services needs, with a focus on benefiting low- to moderate-income individuals. Some programs have additional demographic or geographic requirements.
